# PERF-159 positive: json.NewDecoder over a pre-buffered bytes.Reader
lang: go
file: PERF-159-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type Payload struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	body, _ := readAll(r.Body)
	dec := json.NewDecoder(bytes.NewReader(body))
	var p Payload
	_ = dec.Decode(&p)
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}

func readAll(r interface{ Read(p []byte) (int, error) }) ([]byte, error) {
	buf := make([]byte, 1024)
	out := make([]byte, 0, 1024)
	for {
		n, err := r.Read(buf)
		out = append(out, buf[:n]...)
		if err != nil {
			return out, err
		}
	}
}
